bits.name: timer0_en
bits.comment: timer0 enable

bits.name: timer0_reset
bits.comment: timer0 reset, active high, cleared automatically. When one, the Timer Counter is synchronously reset on the next positive edge of PCLK.

bits.name: timer0_tick_div_bypass
bits.comment: 1, bypass tick divider, TIMER0_TICK_DIV register does not exist. 0, tick divider exists.

bits.name: timer0_tc_hi_dis
bits.comment: 1, the High 16bit of TC and MR is ignored when generating match/wrap interrupt. 0, this feature is ignored.

bits.name: timer0_tick_freq
bits.comment: timer0 tick frequency, used to select TC and adjust counter increment value. 2'b00: tick is 64KHz 2'b01: tick is 64KHz 2'b10: tick is 32KHz 2'b11: tick is 16KHz

bits.name: timer0_match0_en
bits.comment: 1, match0 enable. 0, match0 disable.

bits.name: timer0_match1_en
bits.comment: 1, match1 enable. 0, match1 disable.

bits.name: timer0_match2_en
bits.comment: 1, match2 enable. 0, match2 disable.

bits.name: timer0_match3_en
bits.comment: 1, match3 enable. 0, match3 disable.

bits.name: timer0_tick_div
bits.comment: timer0 tick div value 2'b00: disable tick 2'b01: tick is div2 from rtc clock 2'b10: tick is div4 from rtc clock 2'b11: tick is div8 from rtc clock

bits.name: timer0_tick_div_up
bits.comment: timer0 tick div value update, cleared automatically

bits.name: timer0_match0_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 match0 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when MR0 matches the value in the TC. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 match0 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when MR0 matches the value in the TC. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_match1_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 match1 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when MR1 matches the value in the TC. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 match1 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when MR1 matches the value in the TC. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_match2_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 match2 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when MR2 matches the value in the TC. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 match2 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when MR2 matches the value in the TC. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_match3_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 match3 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when MR3 matches the value in the TC. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 match3 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when MR3 matches the value in the TC. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_wrap0_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 wrap0 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 wrap0 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_wrap1_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 wrap1 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 wrap1 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_wrap2_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 wrap2 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 wrap2 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_wrap3_int_en_set
bits.comment: Write: timer0 wrap3 interrupt enable set 1: Set Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored. Read: timer0 wrap3 interrupt enabled 1: Enalbed. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: not Enabled.

bits.name: timer0_match0_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 match0 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_match1_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 match1 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_match2_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 match2 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_match3_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 match3 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_wrap0_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 wrap0 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_wrap1_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 wrap1 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_wrap2_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 wrap2 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_wrap3_int_en_clr
bits.comment: Timer0 wrap3 interrupt enable clear 1: Clear Enable. An interrupt is generated when TC count from all1 to 0x0. 0: Ignored.

bits.name: timer0_match0_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 match0 interrupt clear, active high

bits.name: timer0_match1_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 match1 interrupt clear, active high

bits.name: timer0_match2_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 match2 interrupt clear, active high

bits.name: timer0_match3_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 match3 interrupt clear, active high

bits.name: timer0_wrap0_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 wrap0 interrupt clear

bits.name: timer0_wrap1_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 wrap1 interrupt clear

bits.name: timer0_wrap2_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 wrap2 interrupt clear

bits.name: timer0_wrap3_int_clr
bits.comment: timer0 wrap3 interrupt clear

bits.name: timer0_match0_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 match0 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_match1_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 match1 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_match2_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 match2 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_match3_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 match3 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_wrap0_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap0 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_wrap1_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap1 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_wrap2_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap2 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_wrap3_int_raw_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap3 interrupt raw status

bits.name: timer0_match0_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 match0 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_match1_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 match1 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_match2_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 match2 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_match3_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 match3 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_wrap0_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap0 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_wrap1_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap1 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_wrap2_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap2 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_wrap3_int_masked_status
bits.comment: timer0 wrap3 interrupt masked status

bits.name: timer0_tc_lo
bits.comment: timer0 counter low 32bit The 48-bit TC, unit is 1us.

bits.name: timer0_tc_hi
bits.comment: timer0 counter high 16bit The 48-bit TC, unit is 1us. Make sure that this high 16bit written before the low 16bit if initialized.

bits.name: timer0_mr0_lo
bits.comment: timer0 match0 register, low 32bit MR0 can be enabled ot generate an interrupt every time MR0 matches the TC

bits.name: timer0_mr0_hi
bits.comment: timer0 match0 register, high 16bit MR0 can be enabled to generate an interrupt every time MR0 matches the TC Make sure that this high 16bit configured before the low 16bit.

bits.name: timer0_mr1_lo
bits.comment: timer0 match1 register, low 32bit MR1 can be enabled ot generate an interrupt every time MR1 matches the TC

bits.name: timer0_mr1_hi
bits.comment: timer0 match1 register, high 16bit MR1 can be enabled to generate an interrupt every time MR1 matches the TC Make sure that this high 16bit configured before the low 16bit.

bits.name: timer0_mr2_lo
bits.comment: timer0 match2 register, low 32bit MR2 can be enabled ot generate an interrupt every time MR2 matches the TC

bits.name: timer0_mr2_hi
bits.comment: timer0 match2 register, high 16bit MR2 can be enabled to generate an interrupt every time MR2 matches the TC Make sure that this high 16bit configured before the low 16bit.

bits.name: timer0_mr3_lo
bits.comment: timer0 match3 register, low 32bit MR3 can be enabled ot generate an interrupt every time MR3 matches the TC

bits.name: timer0_mr3_hi
bits.comment: timer0 match3 register, high 16bit MR3 can be enabled to generate an interrupt every time MR3 matches the TC Make sure that this high 16bit configured before the low 16bit.
